# Netscape HTTP Cookie File
# https://curl.haxx.se/rfc/cookie_spec.html
# This is a generated file! Do not edit.
#
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# HOW TO GET YOUR COOKIES:
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#
# 1. Install Chrome extension: "Get cookies.txt LOCALLY"
#    https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/get-cookiestxt-locally/cclelndahbckbenkjhflpdbgdldlbecc
#
# 2. Log in to YouTube in your Chrome browser
#
# 3. Go to any YouTube page (e.g., https://www.youtube.com)
#
# 4. Click the extension icon → "Export" → save as cookies.txt
#
# 5. Replace THIS FILE with your exported cookies.txt
#
# 6. Redeploy on Render (commit + push)
#
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# IMPORTANT: Keep this file PRIVATE. Never share your cookies.
# Add cookies.txt to .gitignore if using a public repository.
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#
# PASTE YOUR EXPORTED COOKIES BELOW THIS LINE:
